text: My bicycle was stolen outside Bedok MRT last night. The lock was cut and the bike was gone when I returned.
Someone tried opening car doors at the Tampines multistorey carpark around 8pm. They walked away when residents came down.
The lift lobby wall at Yishun block 218 was spray painted overnight. Fresh graffiti was still there this morning.
Suspicious person loitering near Punggol Waterway at about 11pm, peeking into parked bicycles and checking locks.
A man followed me from Orchard MRT to the bus stop tonight and kept bothering me even after I said no.
Be careful everyone, stay safe out there. Heard something happened somewhere in the east.
Haha my lunch disappeared from the office fridge, crime of the century lol.
Train delay at Jurong East again this morning. The platform was packed and announcements were unclear.
Someone snatched a phone from a table at the Chinatown food court around 8:30pm and ran toward the exit.
I think crime is getting worse everywhere and people nowadays have no manners.
At Hougang void deck last night, someone scratched three parked bicycles and damaged the baskets.
A stranger was filming units and tailgating residents into a Clementi condo this afternoon.
My wallet was taken from my bag at Bugis around 9am while I was buying breakfast.
My wallet was taken from my bag at Bugis around 9am while I was buying breakfast.
Someone was trying to steal parcels outside a Sengkang flat at about 11:45pm but left when the corridor light turned on.
Reported by police: shop theft case at Toa Payoh was already in the news today.
A group shouted at and threatened a teenager near Serangoon bus interchange around 9pm.
Someone broke the side mirror of a parked van at Woodlands carpark this morning.
